source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent coiled rattlesnake rises from two overlapping coils on warm paper. Its deliberately varied face uses one wide oval eye, one narrow squint, paired inward brows, slit pupils, and a forked tongue with no U-smile.

process_strategy: The contact sheet locks the two-coil footprint and rising S-curve first, develops the thick neck, head, tail, and rattle around those overlaps, adds belly bands, back diamonds, and a non-default alert expression, then inks and colors only established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: two-coil footprint and rising neck gesture
final_elements.description: Two light overlapping ellipses form the grounded coils while a tall S-curve fixes the raised neck and head direction.

final_elements.name: thick raised neck, rounded wedge head, visible coils, and tail
final_elements.description: A chunky neck and broad cheeked head rise from two clearly overlapped body coils, ending in one short exposed tail.

final_elements.name: segmented rattle and overlap breaks
final_elements.description: Four stacked rattle segments attach to the established tail while clean line breaks show which coil passes in front.

final_elements.name: mismatched alert eyes, inward brows, forked tongue, belly bands, and back diamonds
final_elements.description: One wide oval eye and one narrow squint carry slit pupils beneath inward brows; a forked tongue replaces a smile, and simple band and diamond guides decorate existing body shapes.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with orange, teal, yellow, and dark marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold black marker reinforces established contours while warm orange fills the body, pale yellow fills the belly and rattle, teal fills existing diamonds, and deep brown accents the pupils and pattern edges.

frames.visible_job: Places two light overlapping coil ellipses and one tall S-curve for the raised neck and head.
introduces: two-coil footprint and rising neck gesture

frames.visible_job: Wraps a thick neck around the S-curve, adds the broad head, traces only visible coil sections, and sets the short tail.
introduces: thick raised neck, rounded wedge head, visible coils, and tail
requires_prior_elements: two-coil footprint and rising neck gesture

frames.visible_job: Adds four simple rattle segments to the existing tail and clarifies the established front-over-back coil breaks.
requires_prior_elements: thick raised neck, rounded wedge head, visible coils, and tail

frames.visible_job: Adds mismatched alert eyes, inward brows, slit pupils, a forked tongue, belly bands, and large back diamonds on established shapes.
introduces: mismatched alert eyes, inward brows, forked tongue, belly bands, and back diamonds
requires_prior_elements: thick raised neck, rounded wedge head, visible coils, and tail

frames.visible_job: Thickens established contours and fills the existing body, belly, rattle, eye, and diamond shapes with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with orange, teal, yellow, and dark marker fills
requires_prior_elements: thick raised neck, rounded wedge head, visible coils, and tail
mismatched alert eyes, inward brows, forked tongue, belly bands, and back diamonds

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established outlines, coil overlaps, expression, rattle segments, patterns, and marker fills.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established shapes

rejection_checks: No coil, head contour, tail, rattle segment, eye, brow, pupil, tongue, belly band, diamond, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The snake must retain one raised pose, coil overlap order, scale, and crop across every frame.
Hidden coil sections must remain omitted rather than being fully detailed and later covered.
Reject two matching dot eyes with a small U-smile; the approved expression requires visibly mismatched eyes, slit pupils, inward brows, and a forked tongue with no smile.
Reject glossy vector icon art, airbrushed poster rendering, sticker outlines, badge frames, text, labels, desert scenery, or extra animals.
